tips.title: Did you know?
data: Use the `esc` key in any fount page to return to the previous page.
You can use `ctrl+s` to save the configuration in the configuration page.
Holding down the `shift` key in the chat page can help you quickly delete messages.
If you don't tell the developers, they may never know what problem you encountered.
If you suddenly encounter a weird problem and the developer doesn't reply to you for a while, you can try using the `fount init` command to reset fount.
If you encounter a particularly strange problem, you can try restarting your computer.
Using the `fount remove` command to uninstall a fount is cleaner than deleting the folder.
Type `fount cake` in the command line to get a free and delicious cake!
Any data files of fount are saved in the `fount/data` directory, and you can view, modify and back them up anytime and anywhere.
The name of fount is all lowercase, it is `f`ount, not `F`ount.
Back up all the data your agent regularly operates on before using the new model - you never know if the new model will perform terribly in some places.
fount's main audience is software developers and role-playing enthusiasts, but it is also used in commercial agent construction, medical care, military, finance and other fields.
fount's built-in character ZL-31's name has no meaning and was just a sudden whim.
The images in fount files are all stored in svg form and rendered into png or ico when needed. There are no binary files except LICENSE.
Any code in fount can be run directly without compilation, what you see is what you get.
fount once had a very cool dynamic interactive page background, but it was later deleted because it took up too much CPU.
fount was originally developed for an NSFW agent called "GentianAphrodite".
One of the differences between agents and humans is that humans poop.
Agents are only conscious at the moment they are called, while humans are conscious anytime and anywhere when they are awake.
Some people fall in love or even get married with their agents!
AI is used to write poems, fall in love, and draw pictures for people. Carrying bricks, sweeping floors, and taking out garbage are what humans should do.
Today is not April Fools' Day.
No, you don't.

test.help:
usage: fount test [--all] [--gen-report] [-j <n>] [--since <commit>] [<manifest-ids> [<suite-selectors>]]

manifest id comes from the top-level "id" field in each test/manifest.json.
Multiple manifest ids are comma-separated (no spaces): shells/chat,shells/social
When there is no exact match, expands as "<name>/*" (e.g. shells → shells/chat,shells/social);
globs (*, ?, **) are also supported, e.g. shells/*, **.

suite selectors match each suite's id or name, also comma-separated.

With uncommitted changes, only diff-triggered tests run; with a clean tree, use --since to compare a commit.
When manifest ids are specified, failure records are enabled (data/test/failures/); without explicit suite selectors, failed suites are retried; explicit suite selectors run as named (no intersection with failure records).

--gen-report  Write failure/noisy suite output to disk and generate data/test/report/report.md + report.json (refreshed after each suite).
-j, --jobs    Global concurrency limit (defaults to CPU thread count).

examples:
  fount test
  fount test --all
  fount test --all --gen-report
  fount test p2p,shells/chat,shells/social --all --gen-report -j 16
  fount test shells/chat
  fount test shells
  fount test shells/*
  fount test shells/chat,shells/social
  fount test shells/chat frontend
  fount test shells/chat unit,fed_test
  fount test p2p
  fount test --since abc1234
test.planSlotSummary: Plan slots: ${run} to run, ${reuse} reused, ${blocked} blocked
test.noRealRunPlanned: No real run this time: ${reused} reused, ${blocked} expected blocked (trigger unchanged)
test.allReusedHint: No suite actually ran: failure is inherited from the last run; blocks remain unresolved (files unchanged). Fix the files and rerun, or use `fount test --force`.
test.failuresCleared: manifest ${manifestId} all passed; failure list cleared.
test.terminateIdle: Aborted ${label}: no stdout/stderr for ${minutes} min (idle ${idleSec}s, elapsed ${elapsed})
test.terminateDuration: Aborted ${label}: exceeded watchdog baseline (elapsed ${elapsed}, baseline ${baseline}, limit ${limit})
test.terminateDurationDefault: Aborted ${label}: exceeded default watchdog limit (elapsed ${elapsed}, limit ${limit})
test.terminateSpeculative: Aborted ${label}: speculative dependency not passed — early stop cancelled
test.nothingToContinue: All green with nothing stale — no rerun needed.
test.triggerNoMatchSummary: ${count} trigger(s) matched no repo files (see report.md)
test.ciNoDiffFallback: CI: no diff detected, running all suites (fallback)

tempDir.blocked:
Error: cannot run `fount` in temporary directory

Fount will be deeply coupled with the system and register the `PATH` command and multiple system hooks in `fount`. If running in a temporary directory, after the system clears the temporary files, you will not be able to execute `fount remove` to remove fount and its hooks.

Please move fount to a non-temporary directory before running. If you only want to test briefly, please manually execute `fount remove` after the test is completed.

install.browserMissing: Default browser not detected, trying to install...
install.untrustedPartsWarning: Do not install any untrusted fount components on your system, they can do anything.
install.rootWarning1: Not recommended: running fount as root grants full system access to all fount components.
install.rootWarning2: Unless you know what you are doing, it is recommended to run fount as a normal user.
install.permissionDeniedAsRoot: Error: Cannot write to fount directory '${path}'. You are running as root but access is still denied — please check and fix the folder's security permissions to grant the current user full control.
install.permissionDeniedNotRoot: Error: Cannot write to fount directory '${path}'. Please fix the folder's security permissions to grant the current user write access, or run fount as root.

installer_wait_screen.title: Welcome to fount!
installer_wait_screen.description: Follow the installation's progress and glimpse the features within. fount will be ready to launch in a moment.

hero.title: Imagination, Given Voice.
hero.description: fount is an AI-powered role interaction platform designed to empower you. It is a bridge that connects you with your imagined characters, allowing you to easily talk to them, create your own characters, and share them with the world.

feature1.title: Seamless dialogue, anywhere
feature1.description: Start chatting on your computer and continue seamlessly on your phone or tablet. fount keeps your conversations in sync and stay in touch with your character wherever you go. Runs on Windows, macOS, Linux and even Android.

feature2.title: Beautiful, customisable interface
feature2.description: Choose from over 30 beautiful themes, or create your own. fount is your personal canvas. Express yourself, customise the environment to your preferences, and get a truly personalised experience.

feature3.title: Expressive, immersive chat
feature3.description: fount takes advantage of the power of HTML, allowing characters to express themselves through rich text, images, and even interactive elements. Have dynamic and engaging group chats with multiple characters at the same time.

feature4.title: Unbound AI source integration
feature4.description: fount offers unparalleled choice and flexibility. Connect to any AI sources—OpenAI, Claude, [Atlas Cloud](${atlasCloudLink}), [Evolink](${evolinkLink}), OpenRouter, NovelAI, etc. Communication logic will be shaped by the power of code according to your wishes.

theme_selector.title: Choose your appearance
theme_selector.description: Choose a theme to personalise your experience.

mini_game.title: Play a little game
mini_game.description2: Here's a mini game to pass the time.

sessionSettings.saveFailed: Unable to save group chat settings

settingsPage.title: Group settings
settingsPage.subtitle: Manage group information, members and common functions. Low-frequency permissions, storage, and auditing tools are centralized in advanced settings.
settingsPage.advancedHubDescription: These features change the group's permission structure, historical data, or governance records; adjust only when clearly needed.
settingsPage.channelPermsHint: Set role permission overrides for specific channels. Uncovered items inherit group role permissions.
settingsPage.channelPermsNoChannels: There is currently no channel to configure
settingsPage.emojisHint: Members can insert or send these emojis in chat; uninstalled images are pulled on demand through federated nodes.
settingsPage.emojisDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this group of emojis?
settingsPage.overviewHint: Read-only overview. With governance permissions, edit group info and policies under Basic.
settingsPage.channelArchiveHint: Importing the complete channel JSON archive will create a new ordinary Text channel in this group and restore the history (re-signed by you; attachments only retain metadata).
settingsPage.governanceHint: Write group-level DAG policy; requires admin or MANAGE_ADMINS.
settingsPage.governanceDenied: You do not have permission to modify group governance settings.
settingsPage.rolesDenied: You do not have MANAGE_ROLES permission to edit roles.
settingsPage.channelPermsDenied: You do not have MANAGE_CHANNELS permission to edit channel permission overrides.
settingsPage.notMember: You are no longer a member of this group; the data of this group has been automatically cleared after leaving the group.
settingsPage.profileSectionHint: The name, introduction and method of joining the group will be written into the group metadata.
settingsPage.advancedDescription: Network, storage, speed limit and encryption parameters; please keep the defaults if you are unsure
settingsPage.securityAdvancedDescription: Key rotation and owner succession — mistakes can lock members out
settingsPage.powDifficultyTip: Proof of work difficulty. The higher the value, the longer the calculation time required for strangers to join the public group.
settingsPage.maxDagPayloadTip: The upper limit of data allowed to be carried by a single group event. If it is too large, it will increase synchronisation memory and network overhead.
settingsPage.trustedPeersTip: The number of high-reputation federation neighbors that are prioritized to stay connected.
settingsPage.gossipTtlTip: The maximum number of federated nodes through which the message can be forwarded. Increasing it increases coverage and also increases traffic.
settingsPage.hlcTip: The maximum amount of time that the remote node's clock is allowed to be faster than the local node's clock, used to reject abnormal future events.
settingsPage.sfuTip: Optional external AV relay address. Leave blank for built-in P2P/relay calling.
settingsPage.iceTip: Help WebRTC penetrate the router; when the direct connection fails, TURN will forward audio, video and federated traffic on its behalf.
settingsPage.fileEncryptionTip: Convergent encryption deduplicates but exposes the fact that the files are the same; random keys are more private but take up more space.
settingsPage.keyManagementTip: New keys need to be redistributed to members after rotation. Manual action should only be taken if you suspect a key has been compromised.
settingsPage.allowDangerousHtml: Trusted author messages allow inline HTML
settingsPage.inviteHint: Generate a short-term invitation code (default 1 hour). The other party fills in the group ID and invitation code in "Join Group".
settingsPage.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this group? This action is irreversible and all messages and member data will be permanently deleted.
settingsPage.deleteRoleConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this role?
settingsPage.kickConfirm: Are you sure you want to Kick members ${name}?
settingsPage.kickSelfNodeWarning: Warning: This member uses the same node identity as you. You will also be removed from the group after being kicked out. Are you sure you want to continue?
settingsPage.banConfirm: Are you sure you want to ban member ${name}?
settingsPage.unbanConfirm: Are you sure you want to unblock member ${name}?
settingsPage.keyRotateConfirm: Are you sure you want to manually rotate the master key of this Group files? New members need to resynchronize the history file key.
settingsPage.gshGenerationRetentionHint: Currently only the most recent 64 generations of file master key history are retained. The oldest historical files may not be able to be decrypted after it is exceeded, and it is recommended to archive important data regularly.
settingsPage.gshGenerationNearLimit: Currently rotated to generation ${generation} of file master keys (up to ${maxGenerations} generations). Continuing frequent rotation will result in the oldest historical keys being retired.

auditLog.title: Group audit log
auditLog.hint: Displays members, roles, channels, and moderation events on the current adoption governance branch; only visible to administrators.

group.ownerSuccessionDescription: Transfer the group's top admin permission (MANAGE_ADMINS) to a member. Admins only.
group.ownerSuccessionAutoSignHint: After submission, the device will automatically sign the signature seed of the group without entering the private key. In a multi-administrator group, more than half of the administrators must submit the same ballot (same ballotId and candidate) locally.
group.ownerSuccessionSubmitted: Your signature has been recorded on the Succession Ballot.
group.ownerSuccessionNeedHash: Please fill in the successor's public key hash
group.e2eDecryptUnavailable: The message is encrypted and cannot be decrypted by the current device
group.contentRefBodyPending: External link text (content_ref, not yet pulled for verification)
group.contentRefHashMismatch: The external link text is inconsistent with the storage verification (hash does not match)
group.streamGenerationFailed: AI generation timed out — updates stopped
group.convergentEncryptWarn: Group files use convergent encryption: if an attacker knows a file's plaintext, they can derive the key and decrypt matching ciphertext. Don't rely on group encryption alone for highly sensitive, unique documents.
group.settingsAutoReplyFrequency: Automatically trigger role replies (after every N user messages, 0 is off)
group.settingsAutoReplyFrequencyHint: 0 means off; @mentions will still trigger immediately
group.settingsMaxDagPayload: DAG maximum number of bytes for a single event
group.settingsBatterySaver: Battery saver (smaller federation pool and relays)
group.settingsDiscoveryPublic: Expose this group in federated discovery (without joining the group key)
group.settingsMessageRetentionHint: Visible history is not automatically deleted by default. When enabled, only the local messages hot cache will be pruned; final messages will be retained in the cold archive and checkpoint.
group.settingsHotLatest: Hot zone retention (latest number of posts per channel)
group.settingsHotWindowHint: Hot zone posts are kept in the checkpoint and messages cache; the remaining posts are written to the monthly cold archive after materialization, and then collapsed from the DAG process events.
group.settingsArchiveHint: The cold archive is the final state of the local clear text post (files divided by month). Deleting the archive will not change the DAG; if the history is missing, it can be pulled from federated neighbors.
group.settingsArchiveEmpty: There are no cold archive files yet.
group.settingsArchiveDeleteHint: Only local archive/*.jsonl is deleted; hotspots and DAG anchors are not affected.
group.settingsArchiveAdminOnly: This machine does not yet have cold archive data for this group.
group.settingsArchiveDeleteInvalidMonth: Please select a valid month YYYY-MM.
group.settingsArchiveDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all cold archive files older than ${month}? This operation is irreversible.
group.settingsAutoReplyTokenBucketHint: Each role gets a per-channel token bucket; when empty, onMessage is skipped to curb peak-time spam.
group.settingsIceServersHint: Used for WebRTC and federated P2P penetration; TURN credentials only retain local materialized settings and are not broadcast through federation.
group.settingsFileCeModeHint: High privacy mode uses random contentKey for each block and marks ceMode=random; this reduces the risk of plaintext being guessable, but increases storage and bandwidth usage.
group.membersHint: The member list is synchronized by Viewpoint (placeholder)
group.remoteNodeTimeout: Remote node not responding — try again later
group.remoteUnavailable: Remote part unavailable or RPC unroutable
group.chatNotLoaded: The main chat is not loaded: Please open a conversation with the same ID as the group on the main interface and try again.
group.remoteUnsafe: This message comes from a remote location and the author is not in the local trust list. Rich text rendering has been disabled.
group.trustAuthorOk: This author has been trusted and renders rich text
group.listEmpty: (There are no navigation items yet, administrators can update list-items through API)

listChannelReadonly.placeholder: List channels only display navigation cards and do not send messages

streamNoEmbed.textContent: The stream URL must be an embeddable https:// page, or configure group settings and refresh to get a viewing token.

streamNoSfu.textContent: streamingSfuWss is not configured; admins can set the LiveKit/mediasoup URL in group settings.

group.pinThisMessage: Write this article to DAG and pin it to the top

forceTriggerAllLocalTitle.title: Force all local characters to speak

group.settingsFedTuningHint: Write DAG group settings; after modification, it is recommended to rebind the federation room.
group.settingsAutoChannelGcHint: At most 2 isolated island channels that have been silent for ≥30 days and are unreachable will be deleted when materialized.
group.avNeedStreamChannel: Please use audio and video in "streaming media" type channels
group.voteTooFewOptions: At least two options are required
group.blockConfirm: Are you sure you want to block "${sender}"?
group.threadBreadcrumbRootTitle: Jump to path starting point (first level)
group.threadBreadcrumbMiddleTitle: Show more the middle layer and select the level you want to jump to

inbox.emptyMentionTitle: No one has mentioned you yet

hub.fedRepTip: Connection preference scores calculated locally based on federated node behaviour are not public ratings of group members.

hub.fedDmLinkTip: Requires signing using local identity key. The private key is only submitted to the local service on this page and will not be sent to other nodes.
hub.fedDmLinkDescription: Suitable for debugging or manual identity migration; there is no need to fill in these fields when adding friends on a daily basis.
hub.fedDmInvalidateDescription: After execution, all friend-adding links previously issued will become invalid immediately and cannot be revoked.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage how you appear in chat and social.
profile.advancedDescription: You won't need these for everyday use.
profile.name: Name
profile.ownerDescription: Once set, your owner can edit or delete your chat messages, social posts and profile on your behalf. Their content is also rendered locally as unsafe Markdown (may include scripts). Enter any entity hash; you can clear it at any time.
profile.ownerConfirmEditBody: Once set, they can edit or delete your chat messages, social posts and profile without asking again. Setting an owner by mistake — or being tricked into it — means handing over control immediately.
profile.ownerConfirmRenderBody: Their chat messages and social posts render as full Markdown (including HTML/scripts) in your browser. That lets them run arbitrary code on your machine without further consent. Only continue if you fully trust them.
profile.federationDescription: Configure Nostr relay URLs and power-saving mode. Group federation sync turns on automatically the first time you invite someone or start a federated DM.
profile.federationRelayUrlsLabel: Relay servers (one per line, leave blank to use default)

browser_integration.title: Browser integration
browser_integration.description: Bridge the gap between fount and the web. This page provides the userscript to enable seamless integration, bringing your AI companions into your browsing experience.
browser_integration.pageDescription: In order for your fount role to interact with the web page, you need to install this browser integration script. It acts as a bridge between the character and the browser, allowing them to view the page content and perform actions.
browser_integration.install_script_description: Click the button below to install the browser integration script. You must first install a userscript manager.
browser_integration.install_from_url_tip: Does your browser not allow you to install it? Copy this URL and import the script from the url in the Tampermonkey plugin.
browser_integration.manager_explanation: A userscript manager is a browser extension that allows you to install and run scripts that modify web pages. To use the fount integration script, you need one of the extensions.
browser_integration.csp_warning: You may need to install the plugin to turn off CSP to make the integration function work properly. For ${browser} you can use [this plugin](${link}).
browser_integration.fetch_pages_error: Failed to load the linked page list.

no_pages_connected.title: No connection yet
no_pages_connected.description: Please install the script first, and then visit any website in other browser tabs, which will be automatically displayed here.

autorun.title: Automatically run scripts
autorun.description: Manage JavaScript snippets that are automatically executed when matching a specific website. These scripts can be provided by your AI role or plug-in to enhance or automate your browsing experience.
autorun.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this script? This operation cannot be cancelled.
autorun.add_success: The automatic running script has been added successfully!
autorun.delete_success: The script has been deleted successfully.

no_scripts.title: No automatic script running
no_scripts.description: You have not configured any scripts yet. Please use the form above to add the first one.

error.load_failed: Failed to load the automatic script: ${message}

install_script.name: Magic, infuse!
install_script.description: You have successfully installed the "plug-in" for your browser, now you can do more.
install_script.locked_description: Install the browser integration script once.

run_js.name: Word Made Flesh
run_js.locked_description: Run the JavaScript code once in the browser.

star_fount.name: open source star
star_fount.description: Star the fount on GitHub, thank you for your support!
star_fount.locked_description: Visit fount's GitHub repository and light the star.

update.prompt: A new version of the fount browser integration script is available. Is the update page now open?

browser_integration_script.csp_warning: The fount browser integration script detects that the CSP policy exists on the page, which may cause the integration script to not work properly. Please consider installing the plugin to close the CSP.

hostChange.message:
The current page ("${origin}") is trying to change your fount host address to:

"${newHost}"

Warning: Approving this action will allow the new host to fully control your browser integration features, which may lead to sensitive information leakage or account theft.
Approval should only be made if you are sure that this is your own operation (for example, migrating a fount server).

Are you sure you want to allow this change?
hostChange.uuidMismatchError: fount security error: The identity (UUID) of host ${newHost} does not match your existing one. The operation has been cancelled.
hostChange.verificationError: fount security error: Unable to verify new host "${newHost}". Please check if the address is correct and if the service is running.

terminal_assistant.title: Terminal Assistant
terminal_assistant.description: Beyond the graphical interface, a space for direct command. Interact with fount's core through the terminal assistant, where text weaves its own potent magic.
terminal_assistant.initialMessage: fount supports deploying your favourite characters to your terminal to assist you in coding!

invoke_shell_assist.name: "Hey, fount."
invoke_shell_assist.description: In the dark terminal, the name of the AI ​​partner was called.

ide_integration.description: Connect the fount role to supported editors (such as Zed, JetBrains, Neovim) through Agent Client Protocol (ACP), configure API keys and roles, and bring AI partners into the development workflow.
ide_integration.title: IDE integration
ide_integration.heading: IDE integration
ide_integration.instruction: Use fount roles to assist programming in ACP-enabled editors (such as Zed, JetBrains, Neovim, etc.).
ide_integration.supportedEditorsIntro: The following clients work with fount:
ide_integration.acpDesc: Refer to the following example to configure the fount ACP script:
ide_integration.acpConfigHint: The role id is shown in the role drop-down on this page, and the API key can be managed in user settings.
ide_integration.apiKeyHint: Used for ACP script connection to fount (same set of keys as API proxy, can be created in user settings).

editor.title: Theme editor
editor.autoPaletteInstruction: Click on a color above to automatically fill primary/secondary/accent/neutral colors.
editor.mjsSyntaxHint: Use [async-eval syntax](${asyncDocLink}). Returns an object containing the `load()` and `unload()` functions.
editor.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the theme ${id}?

change_theme.name: Itasha Style!
change_theme.description: The fount had a new look and a completely new mood.

languageSettings.title: Language settings
languageSettings.description: Manage your language preferences for the fount application. Customise your experience with the available language options.
languageSettings.pageDescription: Manage your language preferences here. The languages ​​in the list will take precedence over the browser settings in order.
languageSettings.noPreferredLanguages: No preferred language has been set. Your browser's default settings will be used.

userSettings.title: User Settings
userSettings.description: Manage your fount identity details: profile, access security, and connected devices. A calm, private space for your account.

userInfo.title: User Information
userInfo.copyPathFailed: Unable to copy path to clipboard.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.errorMismatch: The new passwords do not match.
changePassword.missingFields: Please fill in your current password and new password.

renameUser.title: Rename User
renameUser.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to change your username? This will require you to log in again.
renameUser.success: User successfully renamed to "${newUsername}". You will now be logged out.
renameUser.missingParams: Please fill in the new username and your current password.
renameUser.mustDiffer: The new username must be different from the current username.
renameUser.moveFailed: Failed to rename user data directory: ${detail}. The original username has been restored.

passkeys.title: Security keys and Passkeys
passkeys.description: After you register a key, you can sign in with a hardware security key or this device’s Passkey. You need HTTPS or localhost; add keys in user settings first.
passkeys.removeConfirm: Remove this key? You will not be able to sign in with it afterwards.
passkeys.errorLoadLibrary: Could not load the WebAuthn library.
passkeys.apiRemoveParamsRequired: Please provide the credentials and password you want to remove.

userDevices.title: User Devices/Sessions
userDevices.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this device/session?
userDevices.revokeMissingParams: Please provide the device and session password you want to revoke.
userDevices.deviceNotFound: The device or session was not found.

apiKeys.title: API Key
apiKeys.description: Manage the API key for external applications.
apiKeys.keyNotFound: The API key was not found.
apiKeys.revokeMissingJti: Please specify the key to revoke.
apiKeys.revokeMissingPassword: Revoking a key requires a password.
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this API key?
apiKeys.revokeSuccess: The API key has been successfully revoked.
apiKeys.createSuccess: The API key was created successfully.

newApiKey.title: New API key has been created
newApiKey.warning: Please copy your new API key. You won't be able to see it again!
newApiKey.copyKeyFailed: Unable to copy key to clipboard.

editorCommand.title: External editor command
editorCommand.description: Choose the command and arguments template used to open files in an external editor. Supported placeholders fill in the file path, line number and column.

testPathInput.placeholder: Path to a file to try, e.g. C:/work/project/src/main.mjs

editorCommand.testPathRequired: Enter a test file path first.
editorCommand.testSuccess: Ran the command to open your editor.

logout.title: Log Out
logout.description: This will log you out of your account on the current device.
logout.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to log out?
logout.successMessage: Logged out successfully. Redirecting to the login page...

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.warning: Warning: This action will permanently delete your account and all related data, and it cannot be recovered.
deleteAccount.confirmMessage1: Warning! Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmMessage2: To confirm deletion, please enter your username "${username}":
deleteAccount.usernameMismatch: The entered username does not match the current user. Deletion has been cancelled.
deleteAccount.success: Account successfully deleted. You will now be logged out.

passwordConfirm.title: Confirm Operation
passwordConfirm.message: To continue, please enter your current password:

access.title: Access fount on other devices
access.description: Extend fount's reach beyond a single screen. Here lies the gateway—a URL, a QR code—to connect with your companions from other devices, a simple bridge across the local ether.
access.heading: Want to access fount on other devices?

instruction.sameLAN: Ensure the device and fount host are on the same local area network.

QRcode.alt: Scan this QR code to access fount

proxy.title: API Proxy
proxy.description: For developers and integrators, this page unveils the fount API proxy—your connection for weaving fount's capabilities into other applications.
proxy.heading: API Proxy Gateway
proxy.instruction: Generate and manage your API keys on this page to integrate fount with other applications.
proxy.endpointInstruction: This is the base URL for integration with other services.
proxy.usageExampleInstruction: Here is an example of how to get the list of available models using `curl`.
proxy.noApiKey: You have not generated an API key for this page yet.
proxy.queryStringSectionTitle: Can't set APIKey in request header? (Insecure)
proxy.queryStringWarning: Use this alternative method when your application does not support sending the API key in the request header (Authorization header). Please note: Placing the API key directly in the URL poses a security risk as it may be logged in server logs or browser history.

hostConnectionCode.title: Host connection code
hostConnectionCode.infoMessage: Share these credentials with subfount clients to establish connections.
hostConnectionCode.connectionCodeCopied: The connection code has been copied to the clipboard
hostConnectionCode.regenerateSuccess: The connection code has been regenerated

infra.title: Network public good
infra.description: Choose whether connected subfounts act as public-good nodes for the wider fount network. When turned off, they still accept remote execution from this host, but no longer help at the network layer.
infra.capabilityRelay: Join overlay multi-hop forwarding so other nodes can reach each other when a direct link fails.
infra.capabilityMailbox: Hold offline deliveries so peers can still receive direct messages once they are back online.
infra.hostPriority: When enabled, favour this host: weight routes by its reputation table and pin it at the highest priority.
infra.toggleLabel: Let subfounts contribute to the public good
infra.enabledToast: Enabled: subfounts now contribute to the network public good (this host first)
infra.disabledToast: Disabled: subfounts no longer contribute to the network public good

codeExecution.title: Code execution
codeExecution.description: Execute JavaScript code on selected Subfount
codeExecution.noScriptProvided: Please enter the code to be executed
codeExecution.selectSubfount: Please select the Subfount to execute the code...

downloadClient.title: Download subfount client
downloadClient.description: Download the standalone subfount client script to run on the remote device.

achievements.title: Achievement
achievements.description: Explore the milestones and accomplishments of your journey with fount. Each achievement marks a step in your unique narrative.
achievements.pageDescription: Check out your unlocked achievements and milestones here.

open_achievements_page.name: Gotta Catch 'Em All!
open_achievements_page.description: Opened the achievement list and prepared to start a stamp collecting journey.

relock_by_clicking.name: Bruh...
relock_by_clicking.description: You successfully re-locked an unlocked achievement by repeatedly clicking it. Why?

log_viewer.title: Logs
log_viewer.description: View live fount server logs and run a JavaScript REPL in your browser.
log_viewer.connectionError: Unable to connect to the log service. Please try again after accessing fount locally or logging in.

repl.hint: Enter to run · Shift+Enter for a new line · ↑↓ browse history

debug_info.title: Debug & System Info
debug_info.description: Get detailed debugging and system information about your fount installation. This is very helpful for troubleshooting and support requests.
debug_info.heading: Debug & System Info

badges_maker.title: fount! Badge Converter
badges_maker.description: For when your project calls for a touch of fount's character. Convert shields.io badges, lending them a new, resonant identity.

new_url.placeholder: The converted URL will be displayed here

404.title: Page Not Found
404.description: The path you sought has dissolved into mist. Was it a misstep, a forgotten turn? Allow us to guide you back to shore, or perhaps, pause for a game amidst the quiet void.
404.pageNotFoundText: Oops! It seems you've stumbled upon a page that doesn't exist.

directoryListing.title: Directory Index
directoryListing.description: Browse and explore the files and folders in the fount workspace.
directoryListing.name: Name

warnings.straightRow: Straight rows of keys on your keyboard are easy to guess.
warnings.keyPattern: Short keyboard patterns are easy to guess.
warnings.simpleRepeat: Repeated characters like "aaa" are easy to guess.
warnings.extendedRepeat: Repeated character patterns like "abcabcabc" are easy to guess.
warnings.sequences: Common character sequences like "abc" are easy to guess.
warnings.recentYears: Recent years are easy to guess.
warnings.topTen: This is a heavily used password.
warnings.topHundred: This is a frequently used password.
warnings.common: This is a commonly used password.
warnings.similarToCommon: This is similar to a commonly used password.
warnings.wordByItself: Single words are easy to guess.
warnings.namesByThemselves: Single names or surnames are easy to guess.
warnings.commonNames: Common names and surnames are easy to guess.
warnings.userInputs: There should not be any personal or page related data.
warnings.pwned: Your password was exposed by a data breach on the Internet.

suggestions.l33t: Avoid predictable letter substitutions like '@' for 'a'.
suggestions.reverseWords: Avoid reversed spellings of common words.
suggestions.allUppercase: Capitalise some, but not all letters.
suggestions.capitalization: Capitalise more than the first letter.
suggestions.dates: Avoid dates and years that are associated with you.
suggestions.associatedYears: Avoid years that are associated with you.
suggestions.longerKeyboardPattern: Use longer keyboard patterns and change typing direction multiple times.
suggestions.anotherWord: Add more words that are less common.
suggestions.useWords: Use multiple words, but avoid common phrases.
suggestions.noNeed: You can create strong passwords without using symbols, numbers, or uppercase letters.
suggestions.pwned: If you use this password elsewhere, you should change it.
